hero.title: Whatever you want from <coral>the USA</coral>, delivered to your door.

hero.title: Turn Your Network into Income
hero.subtitle: Become a TeVra agent. No investment. No boss. No limits.

values.title: Your own business
values.desc: No boss, no schedule, no office. You manage your time and the growth of your client network with total freedom.

values.title: Zero investment
values.desc: The customer pays first. You risk no capital and need no physical stock. TeVra handles logistics.

values.title: No ceiling
values.desc: There are no limits on your commissions; you decide how much you want to earn each month.

vlapex.title: We are building VLAPEX
vlapex.desc: The app that will allow you to manage orders and view commissions in real time. A digital command center designed for you to operate your business from the palm of your hand. Early agents will have priority access.

register.title: Join the TeVra Network
register.subtitle: Complete the registration process in 3 simple steps and an advisor will contact you for your initial interview.

trust.title: Real infrastructure.
trust.subtitle: We are a registered company with logistics partners in the USA and operational coverage throughout Latin America.

items.title: Logistics Partners
items.desc: Alliances with operators in Miami and California with over 12 years of experience in Peruvian customs.

items.title: Nationwide USA Coverage
items.desc: We operate from all over the USA to always secure the best price.

items.title: Registered Company
items.desc: LLC registered in California with a federal EIN. Total transparency for you and your clients.

items.title: Total Transparency
items.desc: No hidden costs. Your client knows exactly what they are paying for. Every cent is handled professionally.

hero.title: Your bridge to the United States
hero.subtitle: We are a legally registered company in California dedicated to buying, selling, and distributing original tech and branded products from the USA to Latin America.

mission.title: Connecting Latin America with the best of the USA
mission.desc: Connecting Latin American consumers and entrepreneurs with original tech and brand products from the United States, through a reliable network of independent commercial agents, offering affordable prices, secure shipping, and transparent service that generates value for everyone.
mission.quote: "In simple terms: we make it possible for anyone in Peru to buy products from the USA at fair prices, securely, through someone they trust."

vision.title: The largest import network in the Americas
vision.desc: To be the largest and most reliable import and distribution network between the United States and Latin America, powered by proprietary technology, where each agent has the opportunity to build their own business backed by a solid US company.
vision.uber: Think of the Uber model, but for imports.
vision.uberDesc: Uber doesn't own cars — it connects drivers with passengers. TeVra connects local agents with the US market.

process.title: How the process works
process.subtitle: 7 simple steps from deciding what you want to receiving it in your hands.

steps.desc: You decide what you want: Nike, iPhone, perfume, branded clothing... any product available in US stores.
Your agent will provide you with the final all-inclusive price. If you agree, you make the payment directly to your trusted agent.
Your agent sends us the details of your order and payment proof. From here on, we take care of the rest.
We go to the store or wholesale provider and buy exactly what you requested. We take a picture of your product as proof.
Your product goes to our logistics partner in Miami and boards the next flight to Peru. Everything travels securely and fully insured.

steps.titulo: It arrives in Peru and clears customs
steps.desc: Our logistics partner in Lima handles the entire customs clearance process. You don't have to do any paperwork.
The product arrives in Lima and your agent hands it to you directly. Order complete. Estimated time: 5 to 10 business days.

advantages.title: Advantages of the TeVra model
advantages.subtitle: What sets us apart from any other courier or personal shopper.

items.desc: We work with a logistics partner in Miami holding their own licenses for shipping cargo. No middlemen involved — we go straight to the source.

items.titulo: Two hubs in the United States
items.desc: We operate from California and Miami. We always look for the best available price on either coast for your client.
TeVra is a registered LLC in California with a federal EIN. We are not informal — this gives you and your clients peace of mind.
Every shipment travels with cargo insurance. If anything gets lost or damaged, it is fully covered. Your reputation and the client's are protected.
Our partner has over 12 years of experience handling Peruvian customs. They take care of the entire release process. You don't manage any paperwork.
Everything we sell is brand new, factory sealed, and original. No replicas, no second hand. Quality is our priority.

challenges.title: Challenges you should know
challenges.subtitle: We do not paint a perfect world. Every business has challenges and we want you to know them before starting.

items.desc: The estimate is 5–10 business days, but it can be extended due to flight delays, physical customs inspections, or holidays. We always communicate the status.

items.titulo: Not all products can be shipped
items.desc: Flammable liquids, loose lithium batteries, perishable food, and products with special homologation have restrictions. Always ask first.
TeVra provides infrastructure and backing, but you get the clients. If you don't take action, you don't sell. It's an opportunity, not a guaranteed income.
Your client trusts you with their money. That trust is sacred. Every cent must be handled with utmost transparency and seriousness.

howItWorks.title: Buying from the USA has never been easier
howItWorks.subtitle: No complicated paperwork, no traveling. Your TeVra agent handles the entire logistics process for you.

steps.title: 6 steps from order to delivery
steps.subtitle: From when you see the product until you have it at home.

items.title: Explore the catalog
items.desc: Browse our catalog of original products from the USA or share the link of any store with your agent.

items.title: Share the link with your agent
items.desc: Tell your agent what you want. They will quote the final price (product + shipping + commission) and confirm it with you before payment.

items.title: Your agent handles everything
items.desc: The agent reports the order to TeVra. We purchase in the USA and coordinate direct shipping from there.

items.title: Make the payment
items.desc: You pay directly to the agent. They use those funds to process the order with TeVra. Always ask for your receipt.

items.title: Your order travels to Peru
items.desc: The product departs from Miami or California on a direct flight to Lima. 2 weekly departures. Travels insured.

items.title: Receive at your door
items.desc: The agent coordinates final delivery. Total time: 5–10 business days. Done!

items.a: The estimated time is 5 to 10 business days from the purchase in the USA. It may vary due to customs or holidays.
Clothing, shoes, electronics, beauty, accessories, and more. We do not ship flammable liquids, loose lithium batteries, or perishable food.
You pay directly to your TeVra agent. They coordinate the order and inform you of the total cost (product + shipping + commission).

items.q: What if the product arrives damaged?
items.a: All shipments travel insured. If the product arrives damaged, we file a claim with the cargo insurance and compensate you.

items.q: Do I have to do customs paperwork?
items.a: No. Our logistics partner has over 12 years of experience handling Peruvian customs. They take care of the entire process.
Yes. Once dispatched, you will receive a tracking code that you can enter in our Tracking section.

cta.title: Ready to place your first order?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of customers who already import from the USA with TeVra.

iPhone, MacBook, iPad, AirPods, and original Apple accessories with international warranty.
Contemporary seasonal fashion. Clothing, bags, footwear, and accessories from Zara USA.
The largest electronics retailer in the USA. Laptops, TVs, cameras, and gadgets.
Lotions, scented candles, soaps, and personal care products from America's favorite brand.
Clothing, home, electronics, toys, and more at competitive prices from the iconic US store.
Athletic footwear, clothing, and Adidas & Yeezy accessories straight from the official store.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.content: By accessing and using the TeVra platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, you may not access the service.

s2.title: 2. Description of Service
s2.content: TeVra is an intermediation platform connecting buyers in Latin America with products available in the United States. TeVra acts as a logistics intermediary and is not a direct seller of the products.
items: Purchasing and consolidation service in the USA
Insured international transportation
Destination customs management
Network of certified agents for local support

s3.title: 3. Registration and Accounts
s3.content: To use certain services, you must register and create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

s4.title: 4. Product Restrictions
s4.content: Not all products can be shipped. The following are prohibited:
items: Flammable liquids and hazardous materials
Loose lithium batteries (without device)
Perishable food
Products requiring special homologation
Illegal items according to US laws or the destination country's laws

s5.title: 5. Pricing and Payments
s5.content: Prices include the cost of the product, management fee, and estimated shipping. Exact fees are confirmed prior to payment. TeVra does not guarantee prices against exchange rate fluctuations.

s6.title: 6. Delivery Times
s6.content: The estimated delivery time is 5 to 10 business days from the purchase in the USA. This time may vary due to factors beyond TeVra's control (customs, holidays, exceptional events).

s7.title: 7. TeVra Agents
s7.content: Agents are independent collaborators operating under their own commercial responsibility. TeVra provides infrastructure and logistical backing, but is not responsible for direct agreements between agents and their clients.

s8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
s8.content: TeVra shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service. TeVra's maximum liability is limited to the value of the affected order.

s9.title: 9. Modifications
s9.content: TeVra reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting on the platform. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

s10.title: 10. Contact
s10.content: For inquiries regarding these terms, please contact:

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.content: TeVra collects information to provide its services effectively:
items: Registration data: name, email address, phone/WhatsApp number
Order data: products, delivery addresses, purchase history
Agent data: ID, city, coverage zones, categories of interest
Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited

s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Process and track your orders
Communicate the status of your shipments
Connect you with agents in your area
Improve our platform and services
Comply with legal and regulatory obligations

s3.title: 3. Data Sharing
s3.content: TeVra does not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We may share data with:
items: Logistics partners: to process the shipment of your order
TeVra Agents: your name and contact info to coordinate delivery
Authorities: when legally required

s4.title: 4. Data Security
s4.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your information. Passwords are stored encrypted and data is transmitted via secure connections (HTTPS/TLS).

s5.title: 5. Your Rights
items: Access your personal data
Rectify incorrect or incomplete data
Request the deletion of your account and data
Object to the processing of your data for marketing purposes
s5.contactText: To exercise these rights, contact us at

s6.title: 6. Cookies
s6.content: We use essential cookies for the operation of the platform (user session, shopping cart) and analytical cookies to improve the experience. You can configure your browser to reject non-essential cookies.

s7.title: 7. Data Retention
s7.content: We retain your data as long as your account is active or as necessary to provide the service. Order data is kept for 5 years for tax and legal obligations.
